welcomeCloudSyncBodyShort: When on, progress can follow you to another computer or phone on the same browser profile; data is encrypted in transit. When off, everything stays only on this device.
welcomeCloudSyncOffRisk: With sync off, if you clear browser data or change devices without exporting a backup from Profile, you may lose local progress.
welcomeEnterGardenLicenseReminder: All shared trees are free to reuse (CC BY-SA 4.0).
